acquisition method: comparative proteomics based on TMT labeling and the SPS-MS3 approach
collision energy: collision energy of Function 1 was 6 V, while for Function 2, we used a ramp from 10 to 30 V
instrument: coupled with a high-resolution QTOF mass spectrometer (HRMS) (Waters™, Synapt G2Si)
ionization type: For the spectrometric analyses, electrospray ionization (ESI) was used in positive and negative modes.
